variants: Jovana Petric has made a significant mark as a mentor at Hearthside Creativity Lab, where she is dedicated to fostering creativity in aspiring artists. Her expertise is underscored by her possession of a Runestone Engraver Warrant, which signifies her proficiency in the art of engraving. Throughout her career, she has been guided by her mentor, Noriko Yanagida, who has been instrumental in her professional development. Jovana's published works can be found in the Maplefire Anthology, reflecting her contributions to the field. Furthermore, her research is backed by the Outpost Discovery Association, serving as her primary funding source.
